title: Ceneh #5573
definition:
Seneh = "thorny"

 1) a rocky height with crags which stood in the passage of Michmash
    6.5 miles (10.4 km) north of Jerusalem; Jonathan attacked the
    Philistine outpost on this height
nasbUsage:
